typography.pairing_strategy: The 'Editorial Future' archetype. Outfit brings wide, tech-forward energy to massive headings. JetBrains Mono adds a sterile, precision-engineered aesthetic to labels, small texts, and the editorial marquee.

visual_enhancers.gradient_treatment: Electric violet to cyan drifting background gradient, mapped to a 3D plane or fixed div behind the 3D canvas. Subdued opacity (10-20%) to let the robot pop.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0a0a0f]/80 border-b border-white/10 for header.
visual_enhancers.glow_bloom: Use EffectComposer in R3F with Bloom pass for the robot's eyes and the pulsing button. For DOM elements, use box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.5).
visual_enhancers.textures: Procedural noise or starfield over the dark background to avoid digital flatness.

layouts_and_grids.spacing_system: Generous. Use p-8, py-24, py-32 for sections.
layouts_and_grids.hero: 100vh height. Text positioned via absolute overlapping the 3D canvas.
layouts_and_grids.modes_section: Bento-style text overlay or full-screen scroll-snapping points aligned to the left, while robot stays fixed in the center/right.

motion_and_interactions.scroll_scrubbing: Use framer-motion's useScroll and useTransform mapped to R3F's useFrame to rotate and transition the robot's poses.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Framer-motion staggered line-by-line reveal for the hero headline.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons must shift colors and increase glow spread on hover. Never use generic 'transition: all'.

sections_blueprint.name: Navigation
sections_blueprint.details: Fixed sticky header, glassmorphic dark bg. Logo: Northstar.

sections_blueprint.name: Hero
sections_blueprint.details: Masked line-by-line text reveal: 'An AI agent that gets smarter every time you talk to it.' Robot floats center-screen with a subtle idle bob and rotation.

sections_blueprint.name: Modes
sections_blueprint.details: Scroll-triggered. Study Mode (book + blue wash), Code Mode (bracket + green wash), Late Night Talk Mode (moon + purple wash), General Mode (orb + white wash).

sections_blueprint.name: Memory
sections_blueprint.details: Floating DOM text snippets or 3D text fragments orbiting the robot. Neural thread canvas or SVG connection.

sections_blueprint.name: Manifesto & Marquee
sections_blueprint.details: Numbered chapters using JetBrains Mono. react-fast-marquee showing 'NORTHSTAR - ALWAYS LEARNING' at the section divider.

sections_blueprint.name: CTA
sections_blueprint.details: Camera pulls back. Robot in ready pose. Bright pulsing 'Start Talking' button.

setup_steps: 1. Wrap the entire app or main scrolling area in Lenis.
2. Set up a fixed Canvas taking 100vw and 100vh.
3. Use ScrollControls from @react-three/drei or Framer Motion's useScroll to sync Three.js camera/group rotation with DOM scroll.
4. Build the Robot procedurally using <CapsuleGeometry> for body, <SphereGeometry> for head. Apply MeshStandardMaterial with soft shading.
5. Add post-processing <EffectComposer> and <Bloom> for glowing eyes/accents.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text against #0a0a0f meets APCA guidelines.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: DO NOT use Inter or Space Grotesk. Strictly use Outfit and JetBrains Mono.
DO NOT use a fully transparent header; use backdrop-blur with a semi-transparent dark background (e.g. bg-[#0a0a0f]/80).
Ensure 3D scenes have adequate lighting (AmbientLight + DirectionalLight) so the soft-shaded robot isn't flat black.
Use proper z-indexing. The 3D canvas should be fixed in the background (z-0), and DOM elements layered above (z-10, z-20).
Implement 'data-testid' on all interactive DOM elements.
Avoid generic centered layouts except in the Hero. Use asymmetrical grid alignment for the Modes content.
DO NOT rely on external images. Build the entire visual experience via CSS gradients, text, and Three.js primitives.
Ensure the application strictly uses .js files, NOT .tsx files.

instructions_to_main_agent.robot_implementation: Build a multi-part Three.js group representing the robot. Animate the group's rotation.y based on scroll progress.
instructions_to_main_agent.dom_overlay: Use framer-motion for the textual overlays in the sections. As the user scrolls, fade out Hero text and fade in Modes text.

GENERAL_UI_UX_DESIGN_GUIDELINES: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
Ensure all text has a minimum contrast ratio of 4.5:1 against backgrounds.
Buttons and links must have distinct hover, focus, and active states.
Never use completely transparent backgrounds for overlays or headers over content.
Rely heavily on typography and negative space for hierarchy.
